{
  "xenonPreset": 1,
  "exportedAt": "2026-07-18T12:56:11.469Z",
  "appVersion": "",
  "gridCols": 24,
  "kind": "theme",
  "name": "Forest",
  "data": {
    "appearance": "dark",
    "autoPalette": false,
    "styleMode": "glass",
    "retroScanlines": false,
    "accent": "#7aa864",
    "background": "#0a110a",
    "surface": null,
    "surfaceAlt": null,
    "controlColor": null,
    "text": "#e0ebd9",
    "mutedText": "#88a378",
    "lineColor": "#3d5c31",
    "accentText": null,
    "successColor": null,
    "warningColor": null,
    "dangerColor": null,
    "infoColor": null,
    "paletteVariants": null,
    "contrastGuard": true,
    "dynamicAlbumTheme": true,
    "panelAlpha": 0.45,
    "panelBorderStrength": 1.2,
    "panelShadowStrength": 1.2,
    "uiRoundness": 1,
    "glassBlur": 30,
    "glassSaturate": 150,
    "bgDim": 0.2,
    "bgBlur": 0,
    "bgAurora": {
      "enabled": false,
      "intensity": 55,
      "speed": 50
    },
    "bgGrid": {
      "enabled": false,
      "color": "#7aa864",
      "intensity": 45,
      "speed": 50
    },
    "bgStatic": {
      "style": "none",
      "intensity": 70
    },
    "bgCustom": {
      "enabled": true,
      "name": "Forest",
      "code": "const particles = [];\nlet initialized = false;\n\nfunction draw(ctx, t, w, h, assets) {\n  if (!initialized) {\n    // 1. Leśne liście\n    for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {\n      const colors = [\n        `rgba(40, 70, 30, ${Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.3})`,\n        `rgba(60, 80, 20, ${Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.3})`,\n        `rgba(80, 60, 30, ${Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.3})`\n      ];\n      particles.push({\n        type: 'leaf',\n        baseX: Math.random() * (w * 1.2) - (w * 0.1), \n        baseY: Math.random() * (h * 1.5) - (h * 0.5),\n        size: Math.random() * 6 + 3,\n        speedX: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 15, \n        speedY: Math.random() * 20 + 10,    \n        swaySpeed: Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.5,\n        swayAmp: Math.random() * 40 + 20, \n        rotSpeed: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2,\n        flipSpeed: Math.random() * 2 + 1,\n        offset: Math.random() * 100,\n        color: colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)]\n      });\n    }\n\n    // 2. Świetliki\n    for (let i = 0; i < 120; i++) {\n      particles.push({\n        type: 'firefly',\n        baseX: Math.random() * w,\n        baseY: Math.random() * (h * 0.8) + (h * 0.2), \n        size: Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.5,\n        speedX: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10, \n        speedY: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10 - 5, \n        offset: Math.random() * 1000,\n        floatSpeed: Math.random() * 2 + 1,\n        hue: Math.random() * 30 + 50 \n      });\n    }\n    \n    initialized = true;\n  }\n\n  // Wymuszenie wysokiej jakości obrazu\n  ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;\n  ctx.imageSmoothingQuality = 'high';\n\n  // --- RYSOWANIE TŁA ---\n  if (assets && assets.bg && assets.bg.width > 0 && assets.bg.height > 0) {\n    const scale = Math.max(w / assets.bg.width, h / assets.bg.height);\n    const imgW = Math.ceil(assets.bg.width * scale);\n    const imgH = Math.ceil(assets.bg.height * scale);\n    const imgX = Math.floor((w - imgW) / 2);\n    const imgY = Math.floor((h - imgH) / 2);\n    ctx.drawImage(assets.bg, imgX, imgY, imgW, imgH);\n  } else {\n    ctx.fillStyle = \"#0a110a\"; \n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);\n  }\n\n  // --- CENTRALNE PROMIENIE SŁOŃCA ---\n  ctx.save();\n  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen';\n  \n  const pulse = Math.sin(t * 0.8) * 0.05 + 0.1;\n  const sunX = w * 0.5; \n  const sunY = h * 0.15; \n  \n  const sunGlow = ctx.createRadialGradient(sunX, sunY, 0, sunX, sunY, h * 0.85);\n  const alpha = Math.min(1.0, Math.max(0.0, 0.45 + pulse));\n\n  sunGlow.addColorStop(0,   `rgba(255, 240, 180, ${alpha})`);\n  sunGlow.addColorStop(0.2, `rgba(200, 180, 100, ${alpha * 0.6})`);\n  sunGlow.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(100, 120, 50,  ${alpha * 0.15})`);\n  sunGlow.addColorStop(0.8, `rgba(30, 50, 20,    ${alpha * 0.02})`);\n  sunGlow.addColorStop(1,   `rgba(0, 0, 0,       0)`); \n\n  ctx.fillStyle = sunGlow;\n  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);\n  ctx.restore();\n\n  // --- LEŚNA MGŁA ---\n  ctx.save();\n  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen';\n  const fogPulse = Math.sin(t * 0.5) * 0.03 + 0.08;\n  const fogGradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, h, 0, h * 0.65);\n  fogGradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(150, 180, 160, ${fogPulse + 0.1})`);\n  fogGradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(150, 180, 160, 0)');\n  ctx.fillStyle = fogGradient;\n  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);\n  ctx.restore();\n\n  // --- GŁĘBOKA WINIETA (CZYŚCI ROGI) ---\n  ctx.save();\n  // Wymuszamy nakładanie koloru, żeby czerń na krawędziach faktycznie gasiła wszystko pod nią\n  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over'; \n  const vignette = ctx.createRadialGradient(w/2, h/2, h * 0.4, w/2, h/2, w * 0.75);\n  vignette.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0,10,0,0)');\n  vignette.addColorStop(0.6, 'rgba(2,10,5,0.4)'); \n  vignette.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,5,2,0.95)'); // Ekstremalnie ciemna zieleń/czerń w rogach\n  ctx.fillStyle = vignette;\n  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);\n  ctx.restore();\n\n  // --- ANIMACJA CZĄSTECZEK (LIŚCIE I ŚWIETLIKI) ---\n  particles.forEach(p => {\n    ctx.save();\n\n    if (p.type === 'leaf') {\n      let rawX = p.baseX + t * p.speedX + Math.sin(t * p.swaySpeed + p.offset) * p.swayAmp;\n      let rawY = p.baseY + t * p.speedY + Math.cos(t * p.swaySpeed + p.offset) * p.swayAmp * 0.3;\n\n      const pad = 100;\n      p.x = ((rawX % (w + pad * 2)) + (w + pad * 2)) % (w + pad * 2) - pad;\n      p.y = ((rawY % (h + pad * 2)) + (h + pad * 2)) % (h + pad * 2) - pad;\n\n      ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);\n      ctx.rotate(t * p.rotSpeed + p.offset);\n      const flip = Math.sin(t * p.flipSpeed + p.offset);\n      ctx.scale(1, Math.abs(flip)); \n\n      ctx.fillStyle = p.color;\n      \n      ctx.beginPath();\n      ctx.moveTo(0, -p.size); \n      ctx.quadraticCurveTo(p.size, -p.size * 0.5, p.size * 0.8, p.size); \n      ctx.quadraticCurveTo(0, p.size * 1.5, -p.size * 0.8, p.size); \n      ctx.quadraticCurveTo(-p.size, -p.size * 0.5, 0, -p.size);\n      ctx.fill();\n\n    } else if (p.type === 'firefly') {\n      let rawX = p.baseX + t * p.speedX + Math.sin(t * p.floatSpeed + p.offset) * 30;\n      let rawY = p.baseY + t * p.speedY + Math.cos(t * p.floatSpeed * 1.5 + p.offset) * 20;\n\n      p.x = ((rawX % (w + 50)) + (w + 50)) % (w + 50) - 25;\n      p.y = ((rawY % (h + 50)) + (h + 50)) % (h + 50) - 25;\n\n      const flicker = Math.sin(t * 8 + p.offset) * 0.5 + 0.5;\n      const alpha = Math.min(1.0, Math.max(0.0, flicker * 0.9 + 0.1));\n      \n      ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);\n      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;\n      ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen';\n      \n      ctx.fillStyle = `hsl(${p.hue}, 100%, 70%)`; \n      \n      ctx.beginPath();\n      ctx.arc(0, 0, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n      ctx.fill();\n\n      ctx.shadowBlur = 15;\n      ctx.shadowColor = `hsl(${p.hue}, 100%, 50%)`;\n      ctx.fill();\n    }\n    \n    ctx.restore();\n  });\n}",
      "assets": {
             "bg": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"
      },
      "fps": 60
    }
  }
}
